name: Zhubo Design Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhubo Design Co., Ltd. provides integrated design services in China. The company offers architectural design, urban planning, and landscape design services, as well as undertakes municipal works, including road, bridge, and water supply engineering works. It undertakes commercial, residential, landscape, health care, green building, cultural and sports building, factory housing, HOPSCA, hospitality and luxury resort, and interior design projects. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
